Document:
# Core Rule 9 - Do not share or use other accounts [color=SlateGray][italic]Revision A, 2025-10-11[/italic][/color]
Any penalties equally apply to all users of the penalized account.
# Switching accounts and usernames You may change your username at https://account.spacestation14.com/Identity/Account/Manage
As soon as you create a new account, you must notify admins of your previous username at https://forum.spacestation14.com/c/general/help/46
